title: stachys distans
intro: Stachys distans, also known as the distant betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and relieve symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of Stachys distans include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Stachys distans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
